_comment: Authoritative control state for the autonomous loop. status: active|paused|awaiting_human|done. next_actor: Claude|Codex|human|null (who is AUTHORIZED to act next). roles: per-agent role (peer|planner|executor|reviewer; healer/improver/coverer reserved, not yet active). resource_profiles describe subscription/resource-aware routing preferences; they guide prompts and dashboards but do not grant permissions. A role only NARROWS the watcher's --allow-write ceiling. pending_role_change holds an upgrade/peer/special-role request awaiting reviewer or human approval. coverage_owner/covered_actor/handoff_epoch/cover_turns_used/max_cover_turns drive Slice 3 graceful handoff (coverer). Set status=active and next_actor=<agent> to start the loop.
